speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Hypothetical questions
questions: If you had a lot of money, what would you do?
If you could change one thing about your city, what would it be?
If you were a teacher, how would you teach differently?
speaking.sampleAnswer: If I had a lot of money, I would travel around the world. If I could change one thing, I would reduce traffic in my city. If I were a teacher, I would make lessons more interactive.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Real and unreal situations
questions: What will you do if you have free time this weekend?
What would you do if you won a big prize?
Which situation is more likely for you?
speaking.sampleAnswer: If I have free time this weekend, I will visit my family. If I won a big prize, I would buy a new house, but that's not very likely. The first situation is more realistic for me.
